title: Wholesale MOQ
description: Understand WholesaleVapesUSA minimum order requirements, mix-and-match rules, and practical examples for first and repeat wholesale orders.
heroTitle: What Is the Minimum Order for Wholesale Vapes?
heroIntro: Our standard wholesale minimum order is $750. You can mix eligible brands and categories to reach MOQ while keeping your first inventory buy focused on proven sellers.

moqExamples.title: Starter Mix
moqExamples.description: New retailer starter basket at $750 with 3 to 4 best-selling SKUs to test shelf velocity and customer preference.

moqExamples.title: Category Blend
moqExamples.description: Mixed-category reorder at $1,250 combining core sellers with one new line test for controlled expansion.

moqExamples.title: Fast Reorder
moqExamples.description: High-volume restock at $2,500+ for stores with repeat-through data and established demand patterns.

sections.title: 1. Standard MOQ
paragraphs: This minimum helps maintain wholesale pricing, stable fulfillment operations, and consistent account support for B2B buyers.

sections.title: 2. Mix-and-Match Policy
paragraphs: You can combine eligible SKUs, brands, and flavor profiles to reach the required minimum.
Final basket approval depends on destination compliance and product eligibility.
bullets: Mix nicotine and non-nicotine categories where destination rules allow
Build trial assortments for first orders before scaling reorders
Request assistance from our team if you want help balancing your basket

sections.title: 3. Example Order Breakdowns
paragraphs: Starter Mix supports first-order testing without overloading inventory.
Category Blend balances restocking proven sellers and trialing one new line.
Fast Reorder supports higher-throughput stores and repeat velocity planning.

sections.title: 4. Payment and Invoice Timing
paragraphs: MOQ is validated before invoice finalization.
Approved discounts, including eligible payment-method promotions, are applied according to current wholesale terms.

sections.title: 5. Order Review Notes
paragraphs: Orders may be adjusted if a destination has category restrictions.
If any line item is not eligible, our team will provide alternatives so you can still meet MOQ.

title: Locations
description: See WholesaleVapesUSA coverage across all 50 US states and approved international lanes, with region-specific compliance notes.
heroIntro: We support wholesale delivery across all 50 US states and selected international destinations. Every order is reviewed against destination-specific compliance and product eligibility rules.

internationalCoverage.title: North America
internationalCoverage.details: Canada, Mexico, and select logistics lanes for compliant wholesale shipments.

internationalCoverage.title: Europe
internationalCoverage.details: Case-by-case support for approved countries with documented import compliance.

internationalCoverage.title: Middle East & APAC
internationalCoverage.details: Distributor-led fulfillment available where customs and product rules allow.

complianceNotes.note: PACT Act workflows, adult-signature delivery, and tax stamping are applied where required.
Availability varies by state. Buyers are responsible for local licensing, age-gating, and shelf legality.
Import approvals, duty structure, and SKU eligibility are validated before invoice confirmation.

sections.title: 1. United States Coverage
paragraphs: WholesaleVapesUSA supports shipping across all 50 states for eligible product categories.
Transit times vary by carrier route, destination, and compliance workflow requirements.
bullets: All shipments are reviewed for destination eligibility before release
Adult-signature workflow is used where required
Regional carrier performance can impact final transit time

sections.title: 2. International Availability
paragraphs: International orders are supported on approved lanes and reviewed case by case.
Customs, duty handling, and product-category legality must be confirmed before invoice finalization.
bullets: North America lanes available based on destination rules
Europe and APAC routing available for approved markets
Importer-of-record responsibilities remain with the buyer where applicable

sections.title: 3. Regional Compliance Notes
paragraphs: State and local regulations can differ for nicotine and THC-adjacent categories.
Buyers are responsible for confirming local rules, licensing requirements, and retail restrictions in their jurisdictions.
bullets: Destination restrictions are checked before fulfillment
Ineligible line items may be removed or replaced
Compliance holds can delay dispatch until review is complete

sections.title: 4. Coverage Confirmation Workflow
ordered: Submit destination details in your wholesale inquiry
Our team reviews product eligibility and shipping viability
You receive final confirmation with approved routing and next steps
